comments: Show is titled ‘Reading Rock Revisited 1987’ featuring Chariot, Vow Wow, Lizzy Borden & Zodiac Mindwarp.

Introduction – “Well hello there, this is TV on the radio, Thomas Vance, the music vendor, welcome to the Friday Rock Show, and welcome to another programme of ace concert here on Radio 1, tonight; ‘Reading Rock Revisited 1987’, four of the bands we recorded at last year’s Reading rock festival. And this evening, you’re going to hear: Chariot, Vow Wow, Lizzy Borden and Zodiac Mindwarp. (Ident) First up to pound your speakers or headphones are Chariot…”
